name: process_admin
description: Submit structured information from the applicant so the Python live interview assistant can choose the next controlled interview step.

selected_mode.description: Practice mode selected by the applicant.

selected_visa_type.description: Visa type selected by the applicant.

user_answer.description: The applicant's actual answer to the current prompt or their setup selection in simple text. Do not rewrite off-topic text into a valid answer.

extracted_payload.description: Optional direct fields extracted from the applicant's answer for the current step only. Use exact applicant-provided facts; leave missing fields absent. Examples: passport, form_i20, academic_background, visit_purpose.

answered_current_question.description: Set true only when the applicant gave a plausible answer to the exact active question. Set false for setup choices, off-topic text, help requests, skip requests, or answers to another question.

answer_is_unclear.description: Set true when the applicant's response does not answer the current question, is off-topic, is only another setup selection during an active question, asks for help instead of answering, asks to skip, or is unclear enough that the assistant should repeat/wait instead of moving forward.

answer_score.description: Training Session only. Score the applicant's answer from 0 to 100 for relevance, clarity, honesty, specificity, and interview readiness.

strengths.description: Training Session only. Short strengths from the applicant's answer.

weaknesses.description: Training Session only. Short weaknesses, missing details, or concerns from the applicant's answer.

suggestions.description: Training Session only. Short suggestions to improve the same answer without inventing fake facts.

wants_next_question.description: Set true only if the applicant explicitly asks to skip or move to the next training question.

cancel_current_request.description: Set true only if the applicant clearly asks to cancel or restart the current live interview flow.
